docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2023 BY JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY TESIYA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUDREY PRATT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TESIJA, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRATT, AUDREY $7,957.50 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,072.50, THE BELOW FIGURE INCLUDES MOVING EXPENSE $757.50 PLUS $600.00 PER MONTH WHICHIS THE EXCESS IN RENT PLAINTIFF IS PAYING FOR THE NEW APARTMENT INTO WHICH HE WAS FORCED TO MOVE DUE TO RODENT INFESTATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-27-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-02-2022 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,317.00 FILED BY TESIJA, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT PRATT, AUDREY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PRATT, AUDREY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED NOV-22-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRATT, AUDREY
